message:
fix(node): division-by-zero guard, version bounds check, dead code removal

- atc_participation_weighting: guard tenure_component division when
  established_tenure_seconds is 0 (prevents NaN/Inf propagation)
- replay_capsule: reject format versions above CURRENT_FORMAT_VERSION
  in validate_capsule() to match is_version_supported() semantics
- replay_capsule: extract validate_environment_snapshot() helper to
  deduplicate environment checks between validate_capsule/create_capsule
- lockstep_harness: remove unused TempFileCleanup struct (clippy dead_code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
